steps.title: Identify the favorable/total counts
steps.content: Total visitors $= 375$. Since every visitor is in room A, B, or C, the probabilities sum to 1. So $P(C) = 1 - 0.48 - 0.24 = 0.28$.

steps.title: Compute the probability
steps.content:
Multiply by the total to get the count in room C:
$$0.28 \times 375 = 105$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
